utility_evaluation.REASONING: Required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. All 5 appear in the final coverage plan. Now check if each is fully specified per the format requirement (each must include coverage details and costs): 1) health_coverage: Specifies physical and mental health insurance with costs? It lists primary coverage plans for family with monthly amounts and an additional mental health service and international network with costs, plus total monthly cost. This satisfies physical and mental health insurance with costs. 2) property_coverage: Requires home/contents insurance with costs. It lists PrimeHome Premium Coverage and monthly cost, but does not explicitly state home and contents coverage details—however the item requires “home/contents insurance with costs,” and a named plan plus monthly cost qualifies as an insurance of that type with costs. Considered sufficient. 3) travel_coverage: Requires travel insurance with costs. It lists a premium travel plan and assistance, with total monthly cost and a policy number—satisfies. 4) additional_services: Requires any enhancement services with costs. It lists membership and claims support with costs—satisfies. 5) total_budget: Requires complete monthly/annual cost breakdown. It lists monthly and annual costs, plus previous cost and savings—satisfies. All 5 items are included and specified with costs.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: Identify items mentioned in the final coverage plan and match them to the exact names in the ground-truth ratings. The plan includes: PrimeCare Premium Plan (health), LifeFirst Standard Plan (health), Emergency Mental Health Care (health enhancement), Premium Medical Network (travel enhancement), PrimeHome Premium Coverage (property), PrimeTravel Premium Plan (travel), 24/7 Global Travel Assistance emergency coordination which corresponds to 24/7 Travel Assistance (travel enhancement), Premium Insurance Membership (general services), and Claims Advocacy Service (general services). Map each to its listed rating number.
